title: Anomaly Transformer: Time Series Anomaly Detection with Association Discrepancy
blockers: A local Anomaly Transformer PDF candidate is present, but its rights basis and source provenance have not been confirmed.
MySQL has no PdfSource for this paper; its only PaperSource is metadata_only with full_text_rights_confirmed=false.
A distinct second annotator and an independent adjudicator have not been registered.
next_actions: Confirm whether the local candidate is an open-full-text, user-private-copy or institution-authorized source.
Record source description or official URL, rights basis, confirmer and rights note without committing the PDF.
Run layout_gold_workflow prepare to hash the exact file and create a blank independent annotation case.
Register two distinct annotators; neither copies the other annotation file or parser output.
Generate versioned PyMuPDF, GROBID and MinerU candidates for the same SHA-256.
Import both annotation files to create an unresolved diff and adjudication template.
Register an independent adjudicator and resolve every difference before producing adjudicated Gold.
Run the three-parser evaluation and add error-type analysis; do not report synthetic scores as real.
